slide1.description: Discover a gastronomic experience that transports you to the heart of Lefkoşa.

slide2.description: Handcrafted dishes from time-honored recipes and the finest local ingredients.

slide3.description: Where generations of culinary artistry meet the warmth of Usta Cadde hospitality.

block1.heading: Italy
block1.description: Visitors are drawn to its charming countryside, world-renowned vineyards, and the deep connection to Italy.

block2.heading: Reimagined
block2.description: Reimagining classic recipes, chefs bring a contemporary twist to beloved staples.

block3.heading: Gathering
block3.description: Where friends and family come together at the table, surrounded by the warmth of Mediterranean hospitality.

chef.heading: Our Chef
chef.subtitle: SEASONED
chef.quote: Food is the universal language of mankind.
chef.bio1: The Usta Cadde Lefkoşa team brings years of culinary expertise and a passion for local flavors to your table.
chef.bio2: We are here to offer the most exquisite examples of traditional Cypriot and Mediterranean cuisine.
chef.title: Usta Cadde Team
chef.name: Usta Cadde

wine.heading: Wine Selection
wine.subtitle: Curated Collection
wine.description: Explore our carefully selected wines from renowned Mediterranean vineyards.

barolo.name: Barolo
barolo.description: Full-bodied red from Piedmont with notes of cherry, rose, and truffle.

barbaresco.name: Barbaresco
barbaresco.description: Elegant Nebbiolo with refined tannins and floral aromatics.

chianti.name: Chianti Classico
chianti.description: Classic Tuscan red with bright cherry and earthy undertones.

prosecco.name: Prosecco
prosecco.description: Sparkling white with crisp apple and pear notes.

soave.name: Soave
soave.description: Refreshing white wine with citrus and almond flavors.

christian.name: Christian Cooper
christian.text: Usta Cadde exceeded my expectations! The staff was incredibly attentive and friendly. The flavors were simply magnificent, and the atmosphere made for an unforgettable evening. We'll definitely be back!

emily.name: Emily Hughes
emily.text: A truly magical dining experience. From the moment we walked in, we felt like family. The dishes were fresh and perfectly seasoned. Highly recommend this gem in Lefkoşa!

alexander.name: Alexander Hayes
alexander.text: Exceptional cuisine in an elegant setting. The attention to detail in both food and service made our anniversary dinner unforgettable. A true culinary landmark in Cyprus.

carousel.heading: Quality Ingredients
carousel.subtitle: AUTHENTIC
carousel.description: We offer an exquisite culinary journey, featuring authentic dishes crafted with the finest local ingredients.

slide1.title: Authentic Flavors
slide1.description: Every dish tells a story of tradition and passion. From our kitchen to your table, experience the true taste of Usta Cadde.

slide2.title: Wine & Dine
slide2.description: Our sommeliers have selected wines that perfectly complement each course. Raise a glass to the good life.

slide3.title: Seasonal Ingredients
slide3.description: We source the finest seasonal produce and ingredients to bring you dishes that celebrate the best of each moment.

slide4.title: An Unforgettable Evening
slide4.description: Whether a romantic dinner or a celebration with loved ones, our restaurant sets the stage for memorable moments.

slide5.title: Crafted with Care
slide5.description: Our chefs pour heart and soul into every plate. Discover why guests return again and again.

homeBlog.heading: Resources & Articles
homeBlog.subtitle: Latest News
homeBlog.description: Understanding the regions, flavors, and best pairings for Mediterranean wines.

dolceVita.subtitle: FLAVOR JOURNEY
dolceVita.heading: Love for Good Food. Usta Cadde Style!
dolceVita.description: From classic kebabs to delectable meze specialties, our menu showcases the vibrant flavors and rich traditions of Cyprus.

meze-tabagi.name: Usta Cadde Special Meze Plate
meze-tabagi.description: Daily prepared fresh meze varieties: Hummus, Mutabbel, Atom and Köpoğlu.

kuzu-sis.name: Lamb Shish
kuzu-sis.description: Special marinated tender lamb meat, with grilled peppers and rice.

izgara-kofte.name: Grilled Meatballs
izgara-kofte.description: Usta Cadde style spicy grilled meatballs, with crispy potatoes and special sauce.

findik-lahmacun.name: Mini Lahmacun
findik-lahmacun.description: Crispy mini lahmacun from stone oven (4 pieces).

tavuk-sarma.name: Chicken Wrap
tavuk-sarma.description: Chicken wrap with special sauce, Mediterranean greens and garnish.

maza-salata.name: Usta Cadde Seasonal Salad
maza-salata.description: Fresh seasonal greens with a touch of pomegranate molasses and extra virgin olive oil.

deniz-borulcesi.name: Sea Beans (Samphire)
deniz-borulcesi.description: Fresh sea beans meze with garlic and olive oil.

atom-meze.name: Atom
atom-meze.description: Strained yogurt with hot Albanian pepper and a touch of sizzling butter.

sprite.name: Sprite
sprite.description: Lemon and lime flavored refreshing carbonated drink.

ayran.name: Ayran
ayran.description: Traditional ice-cold ayran from full-fat yogurt.

salgam.name: Turnip Juice
salgam.description: Adana style spicy or non-spicy turnip juice.

limonata.name: Homemade Lemonade
limonata.description: With fresh squeezed lemon and mint leaves.

su.name: Spring Water
su.description: Natural mineral water in glass bottle (330ml).

turk-kahvesi.name: Turkish Coffee
turk-kahvesi.description: Roasted on embers, served with Turkish delight.

booking.subtitle: Get In Touch
booking.description: Celebrate the timeless flavors of Cyprus, where every meal is a masterpiece.

footer.description: Experience the essence of flavor and tradition at Usta Cadde Lefkoşa
footer.copyright: © Usta Cadde Lefkoşa. All Rights Reserved.

events.subtitle: Gatherings & Celebrations
events.heading: Unforgettable Events
events.description: From intimate wine tastings to grand celebrations, Usta Cadde Lefkoşa provides the perfect backdrop for your most cherished moments.

event1.title: Mediterranean Wine Evening
event1.description: An exclusive tasting journey through the region's finest vineyards, paired with artisanal cheeses and mezes.

event2.title: Sunset Jazz Evening
event2.description: Experience the magic of live jazz against the backdrop of the Nicosia sunset, featuring our signature platters.

event3.title: Culinary Masterclass
event3.description: Join our Executive Chef for an intimate cooking session, learning the secrets of traditional kitchen.

events.privateDescription: Whether it's an intimate rehearsal dinner, a milestone anniversary, or a corporate retreat, our dedicated events team will craft an experience tailored to your vision.
